{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Fishers' weapon
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Fishers]] carry wide crescent blades on hilts that look like bent swords.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8">''Soulsmith'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
